product.name: Rev-A-Shelf Polymer Replacement 35 Quart Trash Bin Recycle Waste Garbage Container for Kitchen Cabinet Pullouts, Silver, 2 Pack, RV-35-17-2
features: Replacement Waste Bins: Replacement 35 qt. Polymer Waste Containers for Rev-A-Shelf pullouts to restock your kitchen, bathroom, or office containers with extra trash storage
Designed to Fit: Designed to fit only Rev-A-Shelf 35 qt. pullout waste containers; Only to be used with Rev-A-Shelf branded products
Includes: Replacement bins only; pullout waste containers are sold separately; Optional Rev-A-Shelf waste container frames and lids available, sold separately
Durable Construction: Injection molded polymer plastic designed for durability and lasting use inside or outside the home
Rev-A-Shelf Difference: A global family-owned company offering holistic, convenient, stylish, and smart organization and storage solutions for kitchens, baths, closets, and whole homes since 1984
